headlines.title: Americans see a huge divide between haves and have-nots, new poll shows
headlines.description: A national NBC News poll finds 81% of Americans say there is more that divides than unites the wealthy and ordinary working people.

headlines.title: Senate Republicans grow increasingly frustrated with Trump blindsiding them
headlines.description: As President Donald Trump scrambles to wrap up his war with Iran, he’s escalating another one much closer to home, against members of his own party in Congress.

headlines.title: Supreme Court rules for marijuana user convicted under the same gun law as Hunter Biden
headlines.description: The Supreme Court endorsed a marijuana user's challenge to a law that bars people who consume illegal drugs from having firearms, the same law that Hunter Biden was convicted under.

headlines.title: California billionaire tax proposal qualifies for the November ballot
headlines.description: A proposal to raise taxes on the wealthiest Californians has qualified for the November ballot, state officials said Wednesday, setting up what could be a expensive and divisive fight

headlines.title: Challenger concedes to democratic socialist Janeese Lewis George in D.C. mayoral primary
headlines.description: The leading challenger to Washington, D.C., City Councilmember Janeese Lewis George, a democratic socialist, conceded the Democratic primary for mayor Thursday, putting her in line to lead the capital city and manage its relationship with President Donald Trump

headlines.title: Obama Presidential Center Set to Debut in Chicago
headlines.description: The nation’s 44th president is preparing for the grand opening ceremony of The Obama Presidential Center, a 19-acre campus standing tall over Chicago’s south side where former President Barack Obama grew up. The center is a privately-funded complex that features interactive experiences, a basketball court, a community garden and a public library. NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell shares an inside look for TODAY.

headlines.title: Details of Iran Deal Released; Some Republicans Voice Concerns
headlines.description: President Donald Trump marked the end of the G7 summit by signing a memorandum of understanding with Iran, touting an agreement that includes billions in reconstruction costs. Some Republicans are voicing their opposition, including Sen. Ted Cruz who said “History teaches us that giving billions of dollars to theocratic lunatics who to murder us is a bad idea.” NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Trump touts deal with Iran as administration releases text of agreement
headlines.description: President Trump touted the preliminary peace deal with Iran, which now leads to 60 days of further talks. Critics said the deal gives away too much to the Iranian regime. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

headlines.title: U.S. deportation tracker: Counting arrests, detentions and border crossings
headlines.description: President Donald Trump came into office promising the largest mass deportation in U.S history, targeting the more than 10 million unauthorized migrants living in the United States.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Read the text of the Iran-U.S. memorandum of understanding
headlines.description: A senior U.S. administration official provided the 14-point plan after questions swirled about what was in it.
